name: Sweet Ricotta

ingredients.item: Nocino (walnut liqueur) or vin santo (see Variation)

method: Serves 4 4 very fresh organic egg yolks 60 g caster sugar 500 g fresh ricotta 125 ml Nocino (walnut liqueur) or vin santo (see Variation) 300 ml cream CARAMELISED WALNUTS 80 g caster sugar 50 ml cream 12 walnut halves
In a separate bowl, beat the cream until stiff, then fold the cream into the ricotta mixture.
